Events & Programs

March 9 to March 15

Tuesday, March 10

Tours  
In Focus Tour: Modern Art

Join a LACMA docent for a 30-minute thematic tour of works in the Modern Art Galleries...

Tue Mar 10 | 1 pm PT
BCAM, Level 3  |  LACMA
Tours  
In Focus Tour: Collecting Impressionism at LACMA

Join a LACMA docent for a 30-minute tour of Collecting Impressionism at LACMA...

Tue Mar 10 | 1:30 pm PT
Resnick Pavilion  |  LACMA
Tours  
Gallery Tour: Modern Art

Join a LACMA docent for a 60-minute tour in the Modern Art Galleries.

Please be aware that these tours are volunteer-led and subject to cancellation. Ask a member of our team on the day for details.

Tue Mar 10 | 2:30 pm PT
BCAM, Level 3  |  LACMA

Tours  
Visible and Vibrant: LGBTQ+ Artists in LACMA’s Collection

This series of docent-led tours celebrates LGBTQ+ artists in the permanent collection, exploring how personal experiences shaped artworks on view in the Modern Art Galleries...

Fri Mar 13 | 4 pm PT
LACMA

Saturday, March 14

Drop-in Workshops  
Boone Children's Gallery: Pop Up Art Workshop

Make art with us! These exhibition-based workshops encourage creative inspiration for different activities, so make sure to check out the corresponding galleries....

Tours  
In Focus Tour: Large-Scale Art

Join a LACMA docent for a 30-minute thematic tour of some of the most massive sculptures and installations around the museum's campus.

Please be aware that these tours are volunteer-led and subject to cancellation. Ask a member of our team on the day for details.
